name: pi-better-workflows
description_en: pi-better-workflows — deterministic multi-agent orchestration for Pi. Faithful port of Claude Code's Workflow tool (agent/pipeline/parallel/phase/log) with background runs, resume-from-runId journaling, worktree isolation, and an extra rule teaching the L
description_zh: pi-better-workflows — Pi 的确定性多代理编排。Claude Code Workflow 工具（agent/pipeline/parallel/phase/log）的忠实移植，具有后台运行、从 runId 恢复日志、工作区隔离和额外规则教导 L 的功能。
